emails.body:
Save big on your next project! 

Home Depot is offering 20% off select power tools this week only. Drills, saws, sanders — everything you need to get the job done.

Shop now: https://offers.example/homedepot/powertools-20off

Use code POWER20 at checkout. Offer ends Sunday.

---
You're receiving this because you subscribed to Home Depot promotions. Unsubscribe: https://offers.example/unsubscribe?e=james.maddox@jiaitf.example

Still need that tool upgrade?

Our 20% off power tools event ends in 2 days. Don't miss out on deals like:
• M18 FUEL Drill/Driver Kit — $179 (reg $229)
• 7-1/4" Circular Saw — $99 (reg $129)
• Random Orbit Sander — $49 (reg $69)

Final hours to save: https://offers.example/homedepot/powertools-20off

Code POWER20 still works through Sunday.

---
Manage preferences: https://offers.example/preferences?e=james.maddox@jiaitf.example

Last chance — 20% off ends tonight!

This is your final reminder. The power tool sale closes at midnight.

Top sellers going fast:
✓ Impact Driver Kit — $149
✓ Reciprocating Saw — $89
✓ Multi-Tool Kit — $119

Grab yours before they're gone: https://offers.example/homedepot/powertools-20off

Thanks for being a Home Depot subscriber.
